name: Low income single earner
description: Employee earning €20,000 annually. INPS contributions (9.19%) are deducted from gross BEFORE calculating IRPEF. Includes employment tax credit (creates no-tax area), cuneo fiscale exempt sum (4.8% of income), and €1,000 fixed deduction for 2026. Verified using verify_italy_tax.py script implementing official formulas.

sources.description: INPS employee contributions are deducted from gross before IRPEF calculation
Employment tax credit (detrazione lavoro dipendente) significantly reduces effective tax rate
2026 Budget Law - €1,000 fixed deduction for incomes up to €32,000
Verified using verify_italy_tax.py (independent Python implementation of official formulas)
